notes: Tungsten carbide (WC-6%Co) — common AP projectile core material. Density ~15.0 g/cm³ (varies with Co binder content). Hardness 1500-1600 HV (~1550 BHN equivalent). Used in APCR and APDS cores. Fracture toughness K1c ~10-12 MPa·m^½. Brittle under tension — projectiles may shatter against hard armor above ~700 m/s. RHAe as armor material: ~2.5-3.0 per mm vs small arms KE.
